description: Upgrade plan to migrate Java project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 (latest LTS) and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to version 21, Spring Boot to version 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, migrate javax.* packages to jakarta.* namespace if needed, update dependencies for Java 21 compatibility, and ensure all deprecated APIs are replaced with modern alternatives
tasks.summary: Successfully upgraded Java from 8 to 21, Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5, migrated javax.* to jakarta.* namespace, and modernized deprecated APIs. Build and unit tests pass.
